description:
The docker service is commonly needed to create containers. The docker service can be enabled with the following command: 
$ sudo systemctl enable docker.service
rationale:
To be able to find any problems with misconfiguration of
the docker daemon and running containers, the docker service
has to be enabled.
ocil:
Run the following command to determine the current status of the docker service: 
$ sudo systemctl is-active docker
If the service is running, it should return the following: 
active
title: Enable the Docker service
